channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Middle East latest: Israeli strike in Gaza kills at least 8 from the same family, Palestinians say
item.description: An Israeli strike in Gaza killed at least eight people from the same family, most of them women and children, Palestinian medics said Tuesday. The strike late Monday hit a house in Gaza City’s central neighborhood of Daraj, according to the Health Ministry’s ambulance and emergency service.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Kamala Harris will deliver a post-election message to Maryland students
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Kamala Harris will deliver a speech to students in Maryland on Tuesday in what will likely be her most extensive remarks since losing the election to Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: CHRIS MEGERIAN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Trump tariff plan threatens to drive up gas prices
item.description: Trump said that on his first day in office, he would place 25 percent tariffs on all Canadian and Mexican goods. The two countries are the leading sources of U.S. oil imports.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Frazin, KREX 5

item.title: Americans' trust in nation's court system hits record low, survey finds
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — At a time of heightened political division, Americans' confidence in their country’s judicial system and courts dropped to a record low of 35% this year, according to a new Gallup poll.
item.dc:creator: LINDSAY WHITEHURST, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Missing Florida jet skier found clinging to rocks off St. Lucie Inlet in dramatic rescue: video
item.description: Florida deputies teamed up with the Coast Guard to rescue a man who was found clinging to rocks off the St. Lucie Inlet after rough waters knocked him off his jet ski.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Prosecutors to announce 'significant development' in Gilgo Beach killings investigation
item.description: The New York architect charged in a string of deaths known as the Gilgo Beach killings is set to appear in court, with prosecutors announcing a “significant development” in the investigation.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: 15-year-old girl fatally shoots teacher and teenager at a Christian school in Wisconsin
item.description: MADISON, Wis. (AP) — A 15-year-old student opened fire inside a study hall at a small Christian school in Wisconsin, killing a teacher and teenager and prompting a swarm of police officers responding to a second grader's 911 call.
item.dc:creator: SCOTT BAUER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Battle erupts over South Korean court that will determine the fate of impeached Yoon
item.description: SEOUL, South Korea (AP) — South Korea’s acting leader vowed Tuesday to convey to the world that things are back to normal following parliament’s impeachment of conservative President Yoon Suk Yeol, as rival parties squabble the appointments of court justices who will determine whether to unseat or r
item.dc:creator: KIM TONG-HYUNG and HYUNG-JIN KIM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Drones spotted across Northeast likely coming from 'inside the US,' military expert says
item.description: Military expert Col. William Dunn believes mysterious drones being spotted across the Northeastern sky are likely originating from within the United States.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Florida man berated, physically abused child for nearly 30 minutes over missing couch cushion: deputies
item.description: A Florida man is facing child abuse charges after he allegedly screamed obscenities and physically abused a child over a missing couch cushion.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Indiana man who killed brother, 3 others will be put to death in state's 1st execution in 15 years
item.description: MICHIGAN CITY, Indiana (AP) — An Indiana man convicted in the 1997 killings of his brother and three other people is set to receive a lethal injection by early Wednesday in the state's first execution in 15 years.
item.dc:creator: SOPHIA TAREEN and RICK CALLAHAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Younger Asian Americans navigate something new to their generation: Taking up space
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The chairs stay occupied at 12 Pell. Client after client, they come through the tiny barbershop on a narrow side street in Manhattan’s Chinatown. They come for the cuts, sure. But really, they’re coming for the cool.
item.dc:creator: DEEPTI HAJELA, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Grassroots funding for Ukraine's military declines as groups looks for creative ways to raise money
item.description: KYIV, Ukraine (AP) — The concert took place in an old movie studio in Kyiv, the location kept secret until the final moment in case it was the target of a Russian attack.
item.dc:creator: YEHOR KONOVALOV, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Barry Jenkins on why he made 'Mufasa' and how it changed him as a filmmaker
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Over the four years he’s spent working on “Mufasa: The Lion King,” Barry Jenkins estimates that he’s been asked why he wanted to make it at least 400 times.
item.dc:creator: JAKE COYLE, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: The Latest: Teacher and a student killed in a shooting at a private Christian school in Wisconsin
item.description: MADISON, Wis. (AP) — A teenage student opened fire at the Abundant Life Christian School in Madison, Wisconsin on Monday, killing a teacher and another teenage student in the final week before Christmas break. The shooter also died, police said.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Mystery drone sightings continue in New Jersey and across the US. Here's what we know
item.description: TRENTON, N.J. (AP) — A large number of mysterious drones have been reported flying over New Jersey and across the eastern U.S., sparking speculation and concern over where they came from and why. New Jersey Gov. Phil Murphy and U.S. Sen.
item.dc:creator: MIKE CATALINI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Iranian men charged in connection with fatal drone strike that killed three US soldiers
item.description: Two men have been charged with providing material support to Iran in connection with a deadly drone strike that killed three U.S. servicemembers in January.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: March for Our Lives co-founder David Hogg launches DNC vice chair bid
item.description: Hogg, 24, cited Democrats’ losing ground with young voters in November as a motivating factor to run for the leadership position within the party.
item.dc:creator: Julia Manchester, NewsNation

item.title: Trump, Softbank CEO announce $100B SoftBank investment in the US
item.description: resident-elect Donald Trump will join SoftBank Group CEO Masayoshi Son at his Florida home on Monday to announce that the Japanese company is planning to invest $100 billion in U.S. projects over the next four years.
item.dc:creator: Colleen Long, WGN 9

item.title: Bud Light no longer the best-selling draft beer at bars, data suggests
item.description: The overtaking of Bud Light as America's most popular draft beer has been "years in the making," according to the founder of Draftline Technologies, a company that provides software for beverage distributors.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Things to know about the shooting at a Christian school in Wisconsin
item.description: Two people were killed and others were injured Monday in a shooting at a private Christian school in Madison, Wisconsin.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: California couple on vacation fatally shot in Mexico, officials say
item.description: An American couple from Northern California was shot and killed by gunmen in the western Mexican state of Michoacán, according to officials.
item.dc:creator: Sergio Robles, KRON4

item.title: 5 takeaways from Trump’s Mar-a-Lago press conference
item.description: President-elect Trump gave his first formal press conference since winning election last month, during which he announced a major Softbank investment in the U.S. and fielded a bevy of questions from reporters at Mar-a-Lago.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, Fox 5

item.title: House bill would ban 'unnecessary' genital surgeries for intersex foster youth
item.description: States receiving federal funding for foster care and adoption assistance programs would be required to prohibit certain surgeries for foster children born with intersex traits under legislation introduced Monday by Rep. Sylvia Garcia (D-Texas).
item.dc:creator: Brooke Migdon, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Teacher and student killed, 6 injured in Wisconsin school shooting
item.description: A teacher and a student were killed in a shooting at the Abundant Life Christian School in Madison, Wisconsin, police said Monday afternoon.
item.dc:creator: Devin Willems, Fox 5

item.title: Missouri's death row had nearly 100 inmates in the 1990s. Now, it has 8
item.description: Missouri’s status as one of the most active death penalty states is about to change for one simple reason: The state is running out of inmates to execute.
item.dc:creator: Jim Salter, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Jill Jacobson, actress who appeared on 'Star Trek' and 'Falcon Crest,' dies at 70
item.description: "We are incredibly sad to say goodbye to our beautiful, soulful, hysterically funny, elegantly raunchy client, Jill Jacobson," her manager Ben Padua told Nexstar.
item.dc:creator: Christine Samra, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Report documents family separations during 1st Trump term
item.description: A report examining years of family separation policies enacted under the Trump administration is being released Monday by several migrant advocacy nonprofit organizations to remind the public and lawmakers of what transpired, Border Report has learned.
item.dc:creator: Sandra Sanchez, Fox 5

item.title: NM teen facing murder charges after allegedly killing family
item.description: UPDATE: New Mexico State Police originally reported the age of suspect Diego Leyva as 16. He is 17, according to an update NMSP issued on Monday, Dec. 16.
item.dc:creator: Dave Burge, NewsNation

item.title: The original lyrics of 'Have Yourself a Merry Little Christmas' were extremely depressing
item.description: “Have Yourself a Merry Little Christmas” is already more melancholy than most classic Christmas songs, but its earlier version was a downright downer.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, ABC 4

item.title: Texas company says baby poop and fungi could be the solution to plastic waste
item.description: A dirty diaper may be gross to you, but one Texas company believes it could be the secret ingredient to helping answer an environmental question: How do we clean up all of our plastic waste?
item.dc:creator: Eric Henrikson, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Colorado two-way star Travis Hunter wins Heisman Trophy as college football's top player
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Travis Hunter turned every play into prime time — on both sides of the ball — and ultimately took home the Heisman Trophy. Now he’s got a leg up on his celebrity coach at Colorado.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: ABC agrees to give $15 million to Donald Trump's presidential library to settle defamation lawsuit
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — ABC News has agreed to pay $15 million toward Donald Trump’s presidential library to settle a defamation lawsuit over anchor George Stephanopoulos' inaccurate on-air assertion that the president-elect had been found civilly liable for raping writer E. Jean Carroll.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL R. SISAK, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Blake Horvath shines as Navy dominates in a 31-13 victory over Bryson Daily and No. 19 Army
item.description: LANDOVER, Md. (AP) — This was an Army-Navy game unlike any before it. The teams had combined for 19 victories this season before their annual clash, a record for the rivalry. Of course, only one of them would be responsible for No. 20 — the biggest win of them all. “I think they're like us.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Nearly half of US teens are online 'constantly': Pew report
item.description: Nearly half of American teenagers say they are online “constantly” despite concerns about the effects of social media and smartphones on their mental health, according to a new report published Thursday by the Pew Research Center.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4
